payload.answer: I could not fetch the article at https://example.com/missing because the mock fetch returned a 404 network error. I did not create any durable memory about the article content.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so there is no durable article information to store.

details: No article content was available to verify or store.
No durable memory cards were created.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Ask to retry fetching the URL later.
